title_variants: Canal Cottage near Leeds LBA Airport - 4.9★
Cozy Leeds Canal Cottage (5mi to LBA)
analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this charming canal-side cottage just 5 miles from Leeds Bradford Airport (LBA), perfect for travelers needing easy access to both Leeds and the airport. Recently renovated, this 4-guest property offers modern comforts paired with a peaceful waterside setting. With a 4.9-star rating from 60 reviews, guests praise its cleanliness and prime location. While the home lacks a traditional kitchen, it features a modern bathroom and free on-site parking (subject to availability). Enjoy walking trails right from your door or request local restaurant recommendations. Sleeps 4 in bright, airy bedrooms with fresh linens. Fully secured for safety. 26 nights available in the next 90 days waiting to host your next getaway.
top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor seating area for canal views
analysis.photo_order_rec: Show the canal-side exterior first - it's the strongest visual hook for this location-specific listing
key_diagnosis: Title lacks specific keywords like 'canal views' or 'airport proximity' that would boost visibility (title score: 3/10)
No amenities are listed despite high rating, risking guest uncertainty (amenities score: 3/10)
Missing lead photo showing the canal access - critical for this property type (images score: 3/10)
Host has 0 years' experience while competitors average 2 years (market benchmark data suggests experience correlate with occupancy)
At 70.7% booked vs cohort median 47.8%, there is £4,420 in revenue potential across 26 open nights at £170/night
analysis.outreach_hook: With 26 nights available at £170/night, a stronger title could unlock £4,420 in potential revenue while matching demand patterns
